scripts.dev: concurrently --names "api,web" --prefix-colors "blue,green" "bash -c 'cd apps/api && source .venv/bin/activate && uvicorn main:socket_app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000 --reload'" "pnpm --filter '@aiscreener/web' dev"
scripts.dev:all: concurrently --names "api,web,candidate" --prefix-colors "blue,green,yellow" "bash -c 'cd apps/api && source .venv/bin/activate && uvicorn main:socket_app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000 --reload'" "pnpm --filter '@aiscreener/web' dev" "pnpm --filter '@aiscreener/candidate' dev"
